markdown:
# Vehicle Code
## Division 2. ADMINISTRATION [1500 - 3093]
### Chapter 2. Department of the California Highway Patrol [2100 - 2482]
#### Article 4. Highway Spill Containment and Abatement of Hazardous Substances [2450 - 2454]
##### § 2452

“Hazardous substance” means any hazardous material defined in Section 353 and any toxic substance defined pursuant to Section 108145 of the Health and Safety Code.

*(Amended by Stats. 1996, Ch. 1023, Sec. 424. Effective September 29, 1996.)*

subsections.text: “Hazardous substance” means any hazardous material defined in Section 353 and any toxic substance defined pursuant to Section 108145 of the Health and Safety Code.
